description: Get the context type of a record, such as localization context indicating which country a script is using for execution.

methods.name: getContext
methods.description: Returns the record context object containing key-value pairs for the requested context types.

params.name: options.recordId
params.description: The internal ID of the record

params.name: options.contextTypes
params.description: Array of context types to retrieve (recordContext.ContextType.*)

enums.name: ContextType
enums.description: Context types that can be requested.

members.name: LOCALIZATION
members.description: The localization context of the record, indicating the country used for execution
